privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating an experiment file at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ultimatum_game.psyexp' and a conditions CSV file at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ug_conditions.csv'. The CSV must contain the columns 'offer' and 'keep' and have at least 5 valid rows where the offer and keep values sum to 10.
